name: Sparky
description: Machine-readable launch contract for Sparky. Defines the invocation interface, required inputs, expected outputs, tool dependencies, and environment requirements for runtime execution.

factory.description: Core governance decision engine. Used directly in the factory environment.

openclaw.signature: executeSparky(input: { taskType: string; payload: Record<string, unknown>; context?: Record<string, unknown> }): Promise<{ decision: SparkyDecision; requiredEvidence: string[]; blockingClass: boolean }>
openclaw.description: OpenClaw-facing entrypoint. Wraps runSparky with launch metadata.

key_fields.findings: SparkyFinding[] — per-finding severity, message, artifact ref
key_fields.requiredNextActions: RequiredNextAction[] — itemized next steps with owners
key_fields.blockingConditions: string[] — specific unmet conditions when blocked
key_fields.gateResults: GateEvaluation[] — per-stage gate pass/fail with evidence refs

optional_with_degraded_mode.name: github
optional_with_degraded_mode.purpose: PR state, review decisions, check status
optional_with_degraded_mode.degraded_behavior: Cannot retrieve live PR data; must require evidence to be submitted manually

optional_with_degraded_mode.name: context7
optional_with_degraded_mode.degraded_behavior: Cannot retrieve library docs; library-specific claims must be manually evidenced; note retrieval failure in trace

optional_with_degraded_mode.name: firestore
optional_with_degraded_mode.degraded_behavior: Use file-based SESSION-STATE.md and DECISION_LOG.md for persistence

failure_handling.tool_unavailable: Log unavailability, apply degraded mode per TOOLS.md, continue with reduced evidence quality
failure_handling.missing_required_fields: Issue DEFER with specific missing fields listed
failure_handling.trace_incomplete: Block progression; require record completion before any state transition
failure_handling.secret_detected: Block immediately; flag artifact; do not store secret value in any record

governance_defaults.unknown_owner: BLOCK or DEFER depending on stage

required_validations: TEST_CASES.md TC-01 through TC-20 must all pass
All tool adapters must be tested in target environment
Session state round-trip must be validated
Audit log persistence must be validated
All deployment blockers in INSTALLATION_TARGETS.json must be resolved
